s: Abstract icon pack with 590 hand-designed icons
d:
Appstract is an abstract Android icon pack with nearly 590 hand-designed icons. Originally created by Melanie Gutzmann (mirrorkeydev), this community-maintained fork brings the pack to F-Droid.

Features:
• 590 abstract icons covering popular apps
• Support for Nova, Lawnchair, ADW, Apex, Action, and many other launchers
• Icon request via email
• Wallpapers loaded from GitHub
• Muzei live wallpaper integration

Credits:
• Original design and icons by Melanie Gutzmann
• Built on CandyBar FOSS by Donnnno
• Community fork maintained for F-Droid

All work is licensed under Apache 2.0.
